M1730_PHQ2_LACK_INTRST M1730 PHQ2- Little Interest Or Pleasure In Doing Things This field indicates how often the patient has been bothered by little interest or pleasure in doing things. 00 = Not at all/0 - 1day
01 = Several days/2 - 6 days
02 = More than half of the days/7 - 11 days
03 = Nearly every day/12 - 14 days
NA = NA/Unable to respond CHAR 2 x x x x x
